summary: Verdict GO. TAM $1.35B global fertility-app market; SAM ~$18.5M Taiwan ART patient digital companion (49k cycles/yr post-subsidy expansion); SOM ~$185k ARR via blended Taichung partner-clinic white-label (NT$80k/mo anchor) + 3-5 additional Taiwan clinic licenses + 5-10% patient premium conversion at NT$1,490/yr. Competitor gap: zh-TW IVF-protocol-specific + HPA subsidy math + cross-cycle memory — US apps (Embie/Olly/Alife/Bonzun/Berry) would need 12+ months to replicate localization + regulatory + clinic distribution. Risk: SOM floor depends on landing 2+ clinic licenses; patient-premium-only path borderline.

reason: market verdict=go, advancing per stage graph

summary: Verdict GO. 13 engineer-days (<=14). 5 features decomposed: zh-TW protocol+reminders 3d, cycle diary 3d, subsidy/cost estimator 2d, cross-cycle outcome log+compare 3d, PDF cycle-card + LINE OA hand-off 2d. 8 risks: 3 high (App Review medical classification, PDPA/privacy of health data, zh-TW clinical lexicon accuracy) all with in-scope mitigations (disclaimers, on-device-only SwiftData, partner-clinic pharmacist review), 3 med (drug brand trademark, notification reliability, subsidy rules drift), 2 low (LINE deep-link fallback, iOS 17+ target). No blocker. Dependencies all Apple first-party SDKs + public HPA/TFDA data + partner-clinic URL; zero third-party API keys or server infra required.
